name: Daisy Walker
title: The Librarian
ability: You may take an additional action during your turn, which can only be used to activate a Tome ability.
ability_cn: 在你的回合中，你可以执行1个额外行动，该行动只能用于启动一个典籍能力。
elder_sign: +0. If this test is successful, draw 1 card for each Tome you control.
elder_sign_cn: +0。如果此次检定成功，你每控制1个典籍便抽1张牌。
flavor_text: "I know of books so powerful, they can rewrite reality."
